title: HONGKONG / MORPHOPOLIS
description:
M O R P H O P O L I S
a City of Morphogenesis
reconstructed on a detail (21x29cm) of the picture Morphogenesis, China ink on canvas, 210x450cm.

A bold Plan to abolish Darkness.
"Immer wieder fragen, worauf es ankommt"
 
Filmed on site in Hongkong during Handover 1997

A handmade Da Vaz production© 2000
